if.test: search_type != null and search_type != '' and search_text != '' and search_text != ''

choose.when: ORDER BY DECODE(a.library_code,'9999999',1,99) ASC, a.${sortField} ${sortType} NULLS LAST, a.book_idx DESC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY DECODE(a.library_code,'9999999',1,99) ASC, a.book_idx DESC NULLS LAST, a.book_name

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_BOOK a WHERE a.use_yn != 'N'
AND a.type = #{type}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_BOOK a, ELIB_CATEGORY b ,ELIB_BESTBOOK g ,ELIB_CATEGORY_BESTBOOK h WHERE b.delete_yn = 'N' AND a.cate_id = b.cate_id AND a.book_idx = g.book_idx (+) AND a.book_code = h.book_code (+)
AND a.type = #{type}
AND g.bestbook_idx IS NULL
AND h.cat_bestbook_idx IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_BOOK a WHERE 1=1

${pagingTop} SELECT a.book_idx, a.book_code, a.cate_id, a.book_name, a.author_name, a.book_pubname, a.isbn13, a.book_lend, a.lend_total, a.max_lend, a.book_reserve, a.com_code, TO_CHAR(a.book_pubdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS book_pubdt, a.book_regdt, a.use_yn, a.type, a.format, a.book_image, a.parent_id, a.recommend_cnt, a.library_code, a.approved_yn, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.cate_id) AS cate_name, CASE WHEN a.library_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE e.homepage_name END AS library_name, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.parent_id) AS parent_name,
(SELECT z.comp_name FROM ELIB_COMPANY z WHERE INSTR(z.com_code, a.com_code) > 0) AS comp_name, a.device, CASE a.device WHEN '1' THEN 'PC' WHEN '2' THEN 'PC, 태블릿' WHEN '3' THEN 'PC, 태블릿, 스마트폰' END AS label FROM ELIB_BOOK a, ELIB_BOOKINFO d, CMS_HOMEPAGE e
WHERE 1=1 AND a.book_idx = d.book_idx AND a.library_code = e.homepage_code
${pagingBottom}

SELECT a.book_idx, a.book_code, a.cate_id, a.book_name, a.author_name, a.book_pubname, a.isbn13, a.book_lend, a.lend_total, a.max_lend, a.book_reserve, a.com_code, TO_CHAR(a.book_pubdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS book_pubdt, TO_CHAR(a.add_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS add_date, a.book_regdt, a.use_yn, a.type, a.format, a.book_image, a.parent_id, a.recommend_cnt, a.library_code, a.approved_yn, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.cate_id) AS cate_name, CASE WHEN a.library_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE e.homepage_name END AS library_name, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.parent_id) AS parent_name,
(SELECT z.comp_name FROM ELIB_COMPANY z WHERE INSTR(z.com_code, a.com_code) > 0) AS comp_name, a.device, CASE a.device WHEN '1' THEN 'PC' WHEN '2' THEN 'PC, 태블릿' WHEN '3' THEN 'PC, 태블릿, 스마트폰' END AS label FROM ELIB_BOOK a,
CMS_HOMEPAGE e WHERE a.use_yn != 'N'
AND a.library_code = SUBSTR(e.homepage_code, 1, 8) AND a.type = #{type}

SELECT a.book_idx, a.book_code, a.cate_id, a.book_name, a.author_name, a.book_pubname, a.isbn13, a.book_lend, a.lend_total, a.max_lend, a.book_reserve, a.com_code, TO_CHAR(a.book_pubdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS book_pubdt, TO_CHAR(a.add_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS add_date, TO_CHAR(a.book_regdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS book_regdt, a.use_yn, a.type, a.format, a.book_image, a.parent_id, a.recommend_cnt, a.library_code, a.approved_yn, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.cate_id) AS cate_name, d.book_info, d.author_info, d.book_table, CASE WHEN a.library_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE e.homepage_name END AS library_name, (SELECT z.cate_name FROM ELIB_CATEGORY z WHERE z.cate_id = a.parent_id) AS parent_name, (SELECT z.comp_name FROM ELIB_COMPANY z WHERE INSTR(z.com_code, a.com_code) > 0) AS comp_name, g.bestbook_idx, h.cat_bestbook_idx, a.device, CASE a.device WHEN '1' THEN 'PC' WHEN '2' THEN 'PC, 태블릿' WHEN '3' THEN 'PC, 태블릿, 스마트폰' END AS label FROM ELIB_BOOK a, ELIB_BOOKINFO d, CMS_HOMEPAGE e ,ELIB_BESTBOOK g ,ELIB_CATEGORY_BESTBOOK h WHERE a.book_idx = #{book_idx} AND a.book_idx = d.book_idx AND a.book_idx = g.book_idx (+) AND a.book_code = h.book_code (+) AND a.library_code = SUBSTR(e.homepage_code, 1, 8)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_COURSE WHERE lesson_name = #{lesson_name} AND lesson_no = #{lesson_no}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_AUDIOBOOK WHERE audio_name = #{audio_name} AND audio_no = #{audio_no}
SELECT lesson_no FROM ELIB_COURSE WHERE lesson_name = #{lesson_name} AND book_idx = #{book_idx}
SELECT course_idx FROM ELIB_COURSE WHERE lesson_name = #{lesson_name} AND lesson_no = #{lesson_no}
SELECT audio_idx FROM ELIB_AUDIOBOOK WHERE audio_name = #{audio_name} AND audio_no = #{audio_no}
mapper.update: UPDATE ELIB_BOOKINFO SET book_code = #{book_code}, book_info = #{book_info}, author_info = #{author_info}, book_table = #{book_table}, mod_id = #{mod_id}, mod_date = SYSDATE WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx}
mapper.select: select count(*) from elib_bookinfo where book_idx = #{book_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE ELIB_AUDIOBOOK SET link_url = #{link_url}, mobile_link_url = #{mobile_link_url}, mod_id = #{mod_id}, mod_date = SYSDATE WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx}
UPDATE ELIB_BOOK SET recommend_cnt = recommend_cnt + 1 WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_RECOMMEND WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx} AND member_id = #{member_id}
SELECT COUNT(*)
mapper.sql:
select type, count(type) as cnt, case type when 'EBK' then '전자책' when 'ADO' then '오디오북' when 'WEB' then '온라인강좌' end as name from elib_book where type is not null and type != ' ' and use_yn = 'Y'
AND approved_yn = 'N'
AND approved_yn != 'N'
and ( UPPER(REPLACE(book_name, ' ')) like '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{search_text}, ' '))||'%' or UPPER(REPLACE(author_name, ' ')) like '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{search_text}, ' '))||'%' or UPPER(REPLACE(book_pubname, ' ')) like '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{search_text}, ' '))||'%' )
group by type
mapper.select: select count(*) as cnt from ()
mapper.sql:
select author_name, count(author_name) as cnt from elib_book where author_name is not null and author_name != ' ' and use_yn = 'Y'
AND approved_yn = 'N'
AND approved_yn != 'N'
and ( UPPER(REPLACE(book_name, ' ')) like '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{search_text}, ' '))||'%' or UPPER(REPLACE(author_name, ' ')) like '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{search_text}, ' '))||'%' or UPPER(REPLACE(book_pubname, ' ')) like '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{search_text}, ' '))||'%' )
group by author_name
mapper.select: select count(*) as cnt from ()
mapper.sql:
select book_pubname, count(book_pubname) as cnt from elib_book where book_pubname is not null and book_pubname != ' ' and use_yn = 'Y'
AND approved_yn = 'N'
AND approved_yn != 'N'
and ( UPPER(REPLACE(book_name, ' ')) like '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{search_text}, ' '))||'%' or UPPER(REPLACE(author_name, ' ')) like '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{search_text}, ' '))||'%' or UPPER(REPLACE(book_pubname, ' ')) like '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{search_text}, ' '))||'%' )
group by book_pubname
mapper.select: select count(*) as cnt from ()
mapper.sql:
select to_char(book_pubdt, 'YYYY') as book_year, count(book_pubdt) as cnt from elib_book where book_pubdt is not null and use_yn = 'Y'
AND approved_yn = 'N'
AND approved_yn != 'N'
and ( UPPER(REPLACE(book_name, ' ')) like '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{search_text}, ' '))||'%' or UPPER(REPLACE(author_name, ' ')) like '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{search_text}, ' '))||'%' or UPPER(REPLACE(book_pubname, ' ')) like '%'||UPPER(REPLACE(#{search_text}, ' '))||'%' )
group by to_char(book_pubdt, 'YYYY')
mapper.select: select count(*) as cnt from ()
select count(*) as cnt from ()
SELECT course_idx, lesson_no, lesson_name, lesson_url, book_idx, mobile_url FROM ELIB_COURSE WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx} ORDER BY course_idx
SELECT audio_idx, book_idx, link_url, mobile_link_url, add_id, add_date, audio_no, audio_name FROM ELIB_AUDIOBOOK WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx} ORDER BY audio_idx
mapper.update: UPDATE ELIB_COURSE SET lesson_no = #{lesson_no}, lesson_name = #{lesson_name}, lesson_url = #{lesson_url}, mobile_url = #{mobile_url} WHERE course_idx = #{course_idx}
UPDATE ELIB_BOOK SET approved_yn = 'Y' WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx}
UPDATE ELIB_BOOK SET approved_yn = 'N' WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx}
UPDATE ELIB_BOOK SET approved_yn = 'Y' WHERE approved_yn != 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT book_image FROM ( SELECT book_image FROM ELIB_BOOK WHERE isbn13 = #{isbn13} ORDER BY BOOK_IDX DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
